items.title: Commit Cargo.lock for reproducible builds
items.description: Binary crate has floating major-version deps. Commit Cargo.lock for CI reproducibility.

items.title: Extract shared WORKTREE_MISSING message format
items.description: WORKTREE_MISSING format string duplicated in 4 files. Extract to shared constant.

items.title: Add advisory lock to append_spec_entry
items.description: Read-modify-write race in append_spec_entry. Use flock or append-only writes.

items.title: Add WORKTREE_MISSING integration tests
items.description: Primary new feature has no e2e test coverage. Add integration tests for denial path.

items.title: Add catch_unwind to ensure-worktree binary
items.description: Inconsistent panic handling. Other binaries use catch_unwind, ensure-worktree does not.
